question: Show all customer names, ids and the number of orders by each customer.
sql: SELECT Customers.customer_name, Customers.customer_id, COUNT(Customer_Orders.order_id) AS number_of_orders FROM Customers INNER JOIN Customer_Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Orders.customer_id GROUP BY Customers.customer_id;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个客户的订单数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示所有客户名称、ID及每个客户的订单数量，SQL反向翻译描述正确地选择了相关表和列，并通过COUNT统计订单数量，按客户ID分组，符合原始问题的意图。
